data.title: Trump Plans Fort Knox Gold Inspection As Prices Soar Past $2,940: 'If The Gold Isn't There...'
data.description: Trump and Elon Musk have reignited decades-old discussions about the U.S. government's gold holdings at Fort Knox.

data.title: Nvidia Stock Had A Bad Week After DeepSeek Unveiled Its New Model In January—Now CEO Jensen Huang Says Investors Are Misreading AI's Future Impact: 'Obviously, That Paradigm Is Wrong'
data.description: Jensen Huang, CEO of Nvidia Corporation (NASDAQ: NVDA), addressed investor concerns regarding the necessity of massive AI infrastructure spending during a virtual event uploaded on Thursday.

data.title: Apple CEO Tim Cook Reportedly Meets Trump As Tariff Impact Looms On iPhone Sales And Company's China Strategy
data.description: Amid escalating trade tensions between the US and China, Apple Inc.'s (NASDAQ: AAPL) CEO Tim Cook is said to have met President Donald Trump.

data.title: Asia Markets Mixed, Europe Rebounds; Dollar Heads For Third Weekly Drop - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: 1.1655.The euro was down 0.26% against the U.S. dollar at $1.1701.The British pound fell 0.24% to $1.3749, and the USD/CAD rose 0.30% to 1.2548.U.S. markets closed lower on 2/20 due to tariff fears & Walmart's weak forecast. Gold surged, while major indexes declined. Asia markets mixed.

data.title: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk Pegs Delay In Returning Sunita Williams And Butch Wilmore From Space Station To 'Political Reasons'
data.description: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk on Thursday alleged that the return of the astronauts who went to the International Space Station (ISS) aboard Boeing Co's Starliner spacecraft last year- Sunita Williams and Butch Wilmore- was delayed owing to "political reasons."
